content:
- Completed the verifyservice credential refactor: shared `CredentialValue` now powers `username` and `password`, effective config merging resolves env/file/value sources before runtime, and connection strings use concrete credentials instead of `passfile=`.
- Added credential-focused config and CLI tests for scalar/value/env_ref/secret_file paths, strict invalid-source failures, legacy `password_file` rejection, secret-safe JSON validation logs, and updated verifyservice fixtures/docs to the new operator schema.
- Verified the required gates and task bookkeeping: `make check`, `make lint`, and `make test` all passed; task file marked done/passing and `.ralph/task_switch.sh` has been run. Next after quitting: commit all changes and push.

- Read prior codex progress log entry.
- Confirmed last completed work was the verifyservice credential refactor and task switch already ran.
- Current task summary appeared empty/stale, so next I am refreshing Ralph task summaries and re-reading choose-task rules before selecting the next task.

- Refreshed Ralph summaries and re-read choose-task rules.
- Confirmed the repository is a Nix-driven Rust workspace with Ralph task orchestration; refreshed current task summary is empty.
- Next I am checking for any remaining failing or recurring task markers directly under .ralph/tasks before running the required make check/test/lint branch for an empty active backlog.

- Ran make check through the Nix-backed Makefile target and captured output to .ralph/check.out.
- make check exited successfully.
- Next I am inspecting the check output briefly, then I will run make test and make lint with the same capture pattern.

- Ran make check successfully and captured its output.
- Initial make test capture was inconclusive from the log contents alone, so I am inspecting the flake app wiring and will rerun with explicit exit-status capture if necessary.
- Next I still need definitive results for make test and make lint before deciding whether to stop the loop or create bug tasks.

- Confirmed make test exited 0 and make lint has been run with explicit exit-status capture.
- The active Ralph task summary remained empty throughout selection, so this turn followed the mandatory empty-backlog verification branch.
- Next I will classify the lint result and, if all gates are clean, create .ralph/STOP and end the loop with no new current task file.

- Verified the empty-backlog branch end to end after refreshing Ralph summaries.
- make check, make test, and make lint all exited 0; no failing or recurring selectable tasks remained and .ralph/current_task.txt was absent.
- Touched .ralph/STOP. Next after quitting: none required unless new tasks or bugs are added.
